entity.label: Jeshanah
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: A city of the kingdom of Israel (2 Chr. 13:19).

nodes.label: Jeshanah
nodes.description: A city of the kingdom of Israel (2 Chr. 13:19).

verses.text: And Abijah pursued after Jeroboam, and took cities from him, Bethel with the towns thereof, and Jeshanah with the towns thereof, and Ephrain with the towns thereof.
